indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and could be used as a workspace, but it is not ergonomically suitable for extended periods of computer use.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a comfortable surface to place a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: light
indicators.rationale: The natural light coming through the window is bright and can help reduce eye strain.

indicators.name: window-blind
indicators.rationale: The window blinds can be adjusted to control the amount of light entering the room, which is beneficial for different tasks.

reasoning_summary: The space is moderately suitable for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a comfortable surface and natural lighting, but the bed is not ergonomically suitable for extended periods of use.
